title: Unhidden Advancements
description: With Unhidden Advancements you can see all the advancements you normally can't see!
body:
[![Chat with us on Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/ytGGXz8CXD) [![Available on GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://www.github.com/Hajsori/Unhidden_Advancements)

With **Unhidden Advancements** you can see all the advancements you normally can't see!

![Unhidden Advancements Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5pz118bK/images/bc1ddc0e78f1e108bb1460fc12bc835aee04dba2.png)
